remarks: Experience refined living in this exceptional modern Colonial, privately set on over an acre in coveted North Stamford. Offering more than 8,000 square feet, this impressive residence features 5 bedrooms, 5 full baths, and 1 half bath, blending timeless elegance with sophisticated design. A dramatic marble foyer welcomes you into beautifully appointed interiors with hardwood floors throughout. The gourmet kitchen is designed for effortless entertaining, featuring granite countertops, custom built-ins, and premium stainless steel appliances, including a Viking cooktop and warming drawer, Wolf double convection ovens, Sub-Zero refrigerator, two Bosch dishwashers, and a Frigidaire microwave. The inviting family room with fireplace and built-ins, elegant living room with a second fireplace, and richly paneled cherry library offer refined yet comfortable living spaces. The luxurious primary suite is a private retreat with a sitting room, tray ceiling, private balcony, expansive walk-in closets, and spa-like ambiance. A finished lower level, bonus room, and finished attic provide exceptional flexibility. Professionally landscaped grounds create a private setting, complemented by a heated three-car garage. Ideally located just minutes from premier shopping, dining, and the Merritt Parkway, this remarkable home offers the perfect blend of luxury, privacy, and convenience.
